text:
The error "Input and output currencies don't match" is coming from the Relay API. Looking at the code, I can see the issue. When you're doing a same-chain swap (like swapping USDC to ETH on the same chain), the `originChainId` and `destinationChainId` are the same, but the API is likely expecting different currencies.

Let me check the UI to see how tokens are being selected:
